channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: D20 on a Bus: Season 2
item.description:
Blue M&M, Army Man, Hat, and Lint return to navigate the road to LAX - and their own sordid pasts.

Duration: 55:02

Tags: Dimension 20, D20 on a Bus, travel, transportation, weddings, marriage, family, accents, absurd, chaos, experimental, meta, jasmine bhullar, aabria iyengar, matthew mercer, brennan lee mulligan, katie marovitch

item.title: D20 on a Bus Season 2 Teaser
item.description:
Dragon Master Katie Marovitch is back! Get ready for another thrilling season of D20 on a Bus, premiering TONIGHT on Dropout at 7pm ET / 4pm PT!. FAQ here:https://www.dropout.tv/faq/d20-on-a-bus

Duration: 00:49

Tags: Dimension 20, D20 on a Bus, travel, transportation, absurd, chaos, experimental, meta, katie marovitch

item.title: Dimension 20: City Council of Darkness Trailer
item.description:
A new vein of leadership is about to begin. Series premieres April 8th.

Duration: 02:26

Tags: Dimension 20, City Council of Darkness, vampires, goth, punk, supernatural, paranormal, monsters, absurd, surreal, quirky, witty and clever, charming, horror, dark comedy, tabletop rpg, vampire: the masquerade, what we do in the shadows, parks and recreation, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Welcome to Purpee
item.description:
Welcome to Purpee. It's just like any other small town...almost.

Duration: 01:19

Tags: Dimension 20, tabletop rpg, paranormal, supernatural, conspiracies, absurd, surreal, quirky, horror, dark comedy
